content.full_text:
VALLEY INSURANCE PROGRAM, JOINT POWERS AGENCY

448 West Shaw Avenue • Fresno, California 93704 • (209) 229-1800

Merced Community College District  
State Center Community College District  
West Hills Community College District  
Yosemite Community College District  
June 18, 1990

Mr. Wayne Imberi  
California Fair Political Practices Commission  
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Re: Conflict of Interest Code  
Valley Insurance Program JPA

Dear Mr. Imberi:

Thank you for your assistance and advice in our efforts to make the initial filing of the JPA’s Conflict of Interest Code and the Commission’s Form 730 for our designated employees.

As per our discussion it is our understanding that we are classified as a Governmental Agency not forwarding statements to the Fair Political Practices Commission. Accordingly the 730s will be maintained in the office of the administrator of the JPA or in our financial records center.

Should we require additional instruction in this matter, please advise.

Thank you for your consideration.

Very truly yours,

Vash Webster

VW:mkh
